summary: Backend: 19/21 pytest passed, 2 skipped because Stripe checkout returns 500 (the configured STRIPE_API_KEY=sk_test_emergent is rejected by Stripe with 401 Invalid API Key). Frontend: Login screen + dev-login + role-select + tabs (dashboard/attendance/payments/schedule/profile) all render and navigate correctly on a 390x844 mobile viewport. 3 seed plans visible on Payments tab; Record Payment button visible for trainer; Pay Online button visible for student. Theme + Language toggles + Logout visible on Profile. Top-right notification bell renders. CRITICAL ISSUE: Stripe checkout completely broken because the literal string 'sk_test_emergent' is not a valid Stripe key — student 'Pay Online' will fail with 500. All other reviewed endpoints (auth, sessions+PIN, attendance mark/self, payment-plans, payments/record, feedback, dashboard, notifications) work as specified. Deprecated/legacy warning detected: props.pointerEvents is deprecated (React Native).

critical.issue: Returns 500. Stripe responds 401 'Invalid API Key provided: sk_test_emergent'. The STRIPE_API_KEY in /app/backend/.env is a placeholder string, not a real Stripe test secret. Stripe checkout flow (student pay-online) is non-functional end-to-end.
Cannot be exercised because no transaction can be created (depends on the checkout endpoint above).

ui_bugs.issue: Student dashboard renders a KPI labeled 'STREAK' but backend /dashboard returns 'attended' (count of present attendance records), not a streak. Label/semantics mismatch — should be 'ATTENDED' or backend should expose a real streak value.

integration_issues.issue: Tapping pay-{plan_id} on the Payments tab calls /payments/checkout which returns 500 because of the invalid Stripe key. The UI surfaces a generic 'Failed' banner. End-to-end Stripe flow blocked until a valid sk_test_... key is provided.

react_native_issues.component: Global (likely a Pressable/TouchableOpacity using pointerEvents prop)
react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Originates from react-native-web/RN bridge. Likely in /app/frontend/src/lib/ui.tsx or a third-party. Should migrate to style.pointerEvents.

action_items: CRITICAL: Replace STRIPE_API_KEY in /app/backend/.env with a real Stripe test secret (sk_test_51...). The current value 'sk_test_emergent' is just a placeholder and Stripe rejects it with 401. Without this, /payments/checkout and the student Pay-Online flow remain non-functional.
Optionally surface a clearer banner/error on the Payments screen when checkout returns 500 instead of a generic 'Failed'.
Fix the deprecated pointerEvents warning: locate the offending RN component and switch to style.pointerEvents (likely in src/lib/ui.tsx Button or third-party).
Relabel student-dashboard 'STREAK' KPI to 'ATTENDED' to match backend kpi 'attended', or implement a real streak calculation server-side.
Consider splitting /app/backend/server.py (863 lines, slightly over the 700-line guideline) into modules: auth, sessions, attendance, payments, feedback, dashboards.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'). Migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI >=0.95).
server.py: stripe_checkout endpoint catches bare Exception and returns the raw error string in 500 — fine for dev, but consider stripping internals before returning to client.
server.py: /payments/record allows admin to record a payment with trainer_id=None and no plan ownership check (any plan_id accepted). Acceptable for MVP but worth noting.
frontend payments.tsx: imports Linking/Badge/Ionicons-like items unused (RefreshControl ok). Minor cleanup.
Single-file server (863 lines) — exceeds 700-line guideline; recommend modularizing.

success_rate.backend: 90% (19/21 pytest cases pass; 2 blocked by invalid Stripe key)
success_rate.frontend: ~95% — all critical flows reviewed render and navigate; only Stripe pay-online is broken due to backend Stripe config

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_*-prefixed users (admin/trainer/student) and one TEST session 'TEST Morning Drill' plus attendance, payment, feedback records under those test users. The 3 global seed payment plans are also auto-created by backend startup if absent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run /app/backend/tests/test_trainertrack_api.py after main agent supplies a real sk_test_... Stripe key — the two skipped tests (TestPayments::test_stripe_checkout and test_checkout_status) should pass. Frontend Pay-Online flow on the Payments tab should then return a real Stripe checkout_url. All other endpoints + UI flows are currently green.
rca_of_issue: Stripe key 'sk_test_emergent' is a placeholder, not a valid API key. Stripe responds with HTTP 401 'Invalid API Key provided: sk_test_****gent' (see /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log). FastAPI handler wraps this into HTTPException 500. Reproduction: POST /api/payments/checkout with any valid student bearer token and any seed plan_id → 500. Mitigation: set STRIPE_API_KEY in /app/backend/.env to a real Stripe test secret key (sk_test_51...), then `sudo supervisorctl restart backend`.
